title: The third UK–Nigeria Security and Defence Partnership Dialogue Communique
body: "The United Kingdom and Nigeria held the third United Kingdom-Nigeria Security and Defence Partnership (SDP) Dialogue at the FCDO from 15 to 16 July.   The Dialogue was led by Nigerian Minister of Defence, Mohammed Badaru Abubakar, and co-hosted by the United Kingdom’s Minister of State, Lord Coaker, and Nick Catsaras, the Deputy National Security Advisor to the Prime Minister of the United Kingdom. "
